verdict: PMD Personal Microderm Pro uses diamond-tip physical exfoliation with adjustable suction, delivering consistent results without chemical peels. The device's popularity (highest review count) reflects genuine consumer satisfaction with visible skin refinement.

_research.name: PMD Personal Microderm Pro
pros: Diamond tips last longer than crystals
_research.con: Requires replacement heads every 3-6 months, adding ongoing costs to ownership.
